mapper.update: INSERT ALL INTO member(member_id, login_id, password, userLevel, enabled, last_login, failure_cnt, created_at, update_at) VALUES (seq_member.NEXTVAL, #{login_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1, null, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE) INTO guest_detail(member_id, name, nickname, birth, email, receive_email, phone, gender, point, grade, profile_image_url) VALUES (seq_member.CURRVAL, #{name}, #{nickname}, TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{email}, #{receive_email}, #{tel}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 'BRONZE', #{profile_photo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) SELECT * FROM dual
UPDATE member SET password = #{password}, update_at = SYSDATE WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
UPDATE guest_detail SET profile_photo = '' WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m3.authority, g.name, g.nickname, To_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as birth, g.email, g.receive_email, g.phone as tel, g.gender, g.point, g.grade, g.profile_image_url as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m3.authority, g.name, g.nickname, To_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as birth, g.email, g.receive_email, g.phone as tel, g.gender, g.point, g.grade, g.profile_image_url as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, g.name, g.nickname, To_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as birth, g.email, g.receive_email, g.phone as tel, g.gender, g.point, g.grade, g.profile_image_url as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id WHERE g.nickname = #{nickname}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m3.authority, g.name, g.nickname, To_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as birth, g.email, g.receive_email, g.phone as tel, g.gender, g.point, g.grade, g.profile_image_url as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id WHERE g.name = #{name} AND g.email = #{email}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m3.authority, g.name, g.nickname, To_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as birth, g.email, g.receive_email, g.phone as tel, g.gender, g.point, g.grade, g.profile_image_url as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id} AND g.name = #{name} AND g.email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET failure_cnt = 0 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
UPDATE member SET failure_cnt = failure_cnt + 1 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
